name: Zulip
shortDescription: Connect FlowRunner to a Zulip organization to send stream and direct messages, manage streams (channels) and users, react to and edit messages, upload files, and register event queues. Authenticates with HTTP Basic auth using your Zulip email and API key against your organization's Site URL.

actions.name: Send Message
actions.description: Sends a message to a Zulip stream (channel) or as a direct message. For a stream message, set Type to "Stream", provide the stream name in Recipients, and set a Topic. For a direct message, set Type to "Direct" and provide Recipients as a JSON array of user emails or IDs, e.g. ["user@example.com"] or [9,10]; Topic is ignored. Returns the created message ID.

actions.name: Get Messages
actions.description: Retrieves messages from Zulip relative to an anchor point. Use Anchor ("newest", "oldest", "first_unread", or a message ID) with Num Before / Num After to page. Optionally filter with a Narrow, a JSON array of {operator, operand} objects, e.g. [{"operator":"stream","operand":"general"}].

actions.name: Update Message
actions.description: Edits an existing message's content and/or moves it to a different topic. Provide the message ID and at least one of Content or Topic. Topic edits apply to stream messages.

actions.name: Delete Message
actions.description: Permanently deletes a message by its ID. Requires appropriate permissions in the Zulip organization.

actions.name: Add Reaction
actions.description: Adds an emoji reaction to a message. Provide the message ID and the emoji name (without colons), e.g. "thumbs_up".

actions.name: Remove Reaction
actions.description: Removes an emoji reaction previously added to a message. Provide the message ID and the emoji name (without colons).

actions.name: Get Message Read Receipts
actions.description: Returns the list of user IDs who have marked a specific message as read. Read receipts must be enabled in the Zulip organization.

actions.name: Upload File
actions.description: Uploads a file to Zulip, then stores it in FlowRunner file storage and returns both the Zulip upload URL and a downloadable FlowRunner URL. Use the returned Zulip URL in message content as a Markdown link, e.g. [file.pdf](/user_uploads/...). Large files (25MB+) may fail due to network timeouts.

actions.name: Get Streams
actions.description: Retrieves the streams (channels) the authenticated user can access, including their IDs, names, and descriptions.

actions.name: Get Stream ID
actions.description: Looks up the numeric stream ID for a given stream (channel) name.

actions.name: Get Stream Topics
actions.description: Retrieves the recent topics in a stream (channel), identified by its numeric stream ID. Use Get Stream ID first if you only have the stream name.

actions.name: Subscribe to Streams
actions.description: Subscribes the authenticated user to one or more streams (channels). Provide stream names as an array; any names that do not exist are created automatically. Optionally set a description applied only to newly created streams.

actions.name: Create Stream
actions.description: Creates a new stream (channel) by subscribing the authenticated user to it. In Zulip, streams are created implicitly when subscribing to a non-existent name. Optionally mark it private (invite-only) and set a description.

actions.name: Unsubscribe from Streams
actions.description: Unsubscribes the authenticated user from one or more streams (channels). Provide the stream names as an array of strings.

actions.name: Get Users
actions.description: Retrieves all users (members) in the Zulip organization, including their IDs, emails, full names, and roles.

actions.name: Get User
actions.description: Retrieves details of a single user by their numeric user ID.

actions.name: Get Own User
actions.description: Retrieves the profile of the authenticated user (bot or user). Useful as a connection check to verify the site URL, email, and API key are valid.

actions.name: Create User
actions.description: Creates a new user in the Zulip organization. Requires administrator permissions. Provide the new user's email, password, and full name.

actions.name: Update User
actions.description: Updates an existing user identified by their numeric user ID. Requires administrator permissions. Provide any of full name or role to change.

actions.name: Deactivate User
actions.description: Deactivates (deletes) a user in the Zulip organization by their numeric user ID. Requires administrator permissions. The user can be reactivated later.

actions.name: Register Event Queue
actions.description: Registers an event queue with Zulip and returns a queue ID and the current state. Provide the event types to subscribe to as an array, e.g. ["message"]. Note: fetching events from the queue uses long-polling and is not supported here.

idealUseCases: Post alerts, deploy notifications, or report summaries into a Zulip stream topic
Send direct messages to individuals or groups from an automated workflow
Add or remove emoji reactions to acknowledge or triage messages
Upload files (logs, PDFs, images) and reference them in message content
Provision, update, or deactivate organization members during onboarding/offboarding
Look up streams, topics, and users to route messages dynamically
agentIdeas: Use **Zulip** "Get Streams" to resolve the target channel, then **Zulip** "Send Message" to post a formatted status update to its topic
When a **Slack** "On Channel Message" trigger fires, use **Zulip** "Send Message" to mirror the message into a Zulip stream so both teams stay in sync
Fetch new rows with **Google Sheets** "Get Rows", then call **Zulip** "Create User" for each entry to onboard members into the organization
Use **Zulip** "Upload File" to store a generated report, then **Gmail** "Send Message" to email the downloadable FlowRunner link to stakeholders
